zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Hainaut於1145年4月6日出生在比利時海瑙特內時，她的父親Baudouin IV de Hainaut36歲，母親Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut28歲。她於大約1151年與Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons在法國結婚。她去世於大約1202年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Hainaut于1145年4月6日出生在比利时海瑙特內时，她的父亲Baudouin IV de Hainaut36岁，母亲Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut28岁。她于大约1151年与Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons在法国结婚。她去世于大约1202年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Hainaut was born on 6 April 1145, in Néchin, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, was 36 and her mother, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, was 28. She married Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons about 1151, in France. She died about 1202, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Hainaut est née le 6 avril 1145, à Néchin, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons environ 1151, à France. Elle est décédée environ 1202, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Hainaut am 6. April 1145 in Néchin, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin IV de Hainaut 36 und ihre Mutter Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut 28. Sie hat um 1151 in Frankreich Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons geheiratet. Sie starb um 1202 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Hainaut è nata il il 6 aprile 1145 nel Néchin, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons circa 1151, nel Francia. Morì circa 1202, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais,: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンス
ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Hainautが1145年4月6日にベルギーヘイナトンeチンで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV de Hainautは36歳，母Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainautは28歳であった。約1151年にフランスでIves II de Nesle, Comte de Soissonsと結婚した。彼女は約1202年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Hainaut(이)가 1145년 4월 6일 벨기에 하인오트 e친에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin IV de Hainaut(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1151년 프랑스에서 Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1202년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Hainaut nasceu em 6 de abril de 1145, em Néchin, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons aproximadamente 1151, em França. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1202, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Hainaut родилась 6 апреля 1145 г. в местности нeчин, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin IV de Hainaut было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons около 1151 г. в местности Франция. Она умерла около 1202 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Hainaut nació el 6 de abril de 1145, en Néchin, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ives II de Nesle, Comte de Soissons aproximadamente 1151, en Francia. Murió aproximadamente 1202, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
